title: Activity report helper
lede: Collects your applications for a month so you can copy them field by field into Arbetsförmedlingen's activity report.

info.title: About the activity report helper
info.p1: Arbetsförmedlingen asks you to report each month what you have done to look for work. The activity report is submitted between the 1st and the 14th.
info.p2: This helper collects your applications for a chosen month so you can transfer them into the activity report.
info.p3: Arbetsförmedlingen's form is filled in field by field. Copy one field at a time with the copy buttons instead of pasting a whole text, so the report can be processed automatically.

counter.text: {count, plural, =0 {No applications} =1 {# application} other {# applications}} in {month}.

empty.text: No applications to report for {month}. When you mark an application as applied it appears in the month you applied.

fields.title: Job title
fields.linkOpen: Open the advert in a new tab

error.title: Could not load the activity report
error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.
